content: Enhance DataTable.jsx with optional serverPagination mode (loading state, debounced search, server sort)
Migrate InvoiceModule to serverPagination (with status filter)
Migrate ProductionPOModule to serverPagination (with status filter)
Migrate PaymentModule with PaginationFooter (two tabs paginated independently)
Lint frontend + verify no errors via esbuild
Phase 10B-rem: identify & batch-fix remaining N+1 in report endpoints
Test all migrated screens via testing agent
